s: In 1994, Dane Johnson suited up for CHW as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 6.570, WHIP 2.190, SO 7, WAR -0.300.
Changed teams after the previous season (CHW -> TOR).
In 1996, Dane Johnson suited up for TOR as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.000, WHIP 1.110, SO 7, WAR 0.200. Notable context: Joined TOR.
Changed teams after the previous season (TOR -> OAK).
In 1997, Dane Johnson suited up for OAK as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.530, WHIP 1.750, SO 43, WAR 0.100. Notable context: Joined OAK.
